Bash(SUPABASE_URL="https://talruxvrqhanzusjatby.supabase.co" && SERVICE_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InRhbHJ1eHZycWhhbnp1c2phdGJ5Iiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MjU3MDk0MCwiZXhwIjoyMDg4MTQ2OTQwfQ.Q7M0AuSYQJQICP2Hi4OX_buA2414_kLH3Wy08B_zBks" && curl -s "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/deployments?id=eq.43eef8fd-38b8-451b-a48e-009b4b2592a4&select=id,status,error,logs" -H "apikey: ${SERVICE_KEY}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SERVICE_KEY}" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]
print\('Status:', d['status']\)
print\('Error:', d.get\('error','\(none\)'\)\)
print\(\)
for log in d['logs']:
  print\(f'[{log[\\"level\\"]}] {log[\\"msg\\"][:200]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(QUEUE_URL="https://sqs.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/073941171096/infraready-deploy.fifo" && aws sqs get-queue-attributes --queue-url "$QUEUE_URL" --attribute-names All --output json 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['Attributes']; print\('Available:', d.get\('ApproximateNumberOfMessages'\)\); print\('In flight:', d.get\('ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible'\)\)")

Bash(ECR_URL="073941171096.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/infraready-runner" && cd /Users/krunalp/claud-code && docker buildx build \\
  --platform linux/amd64 \\
  --provenance=false \\
  --no-cache \\
  -f packages/runner/Dockerfile \\
  -t "${ECR_URL}:latest" \\
  --push \\
  . 2>&1 | grep -E "\(DONE|CACHED|ERROR|pushing manifest|Step\)")

Bash(ECR="073941171096.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/infraready-runner"
cd /Users/krunalp/claud-code

aws ecr get-login-password --region us-east-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin $ECR 2>&1 && \\
docker build \\
  --platform linux/amd64 \\
  --provenance=false \\
  --no-cache \\
  -t $ECR:latest \\
  -f packages/runner/Dockerfile . 2>&1 | tail -5)
